pi_items.source: Task description, setup_task.sh, and scripts/setup_artifactory.sh which verify the existence of this default JFrog Artifactory OSS repository.
Task description explicitly instructs the user to update the description field to start with this exact string.
Task description explicitly instructs checking the 'Blacked Out' option.
scripts/setup_artifactory.sh hardcodes ADMIN_USER='admin' for initialization and default login.
scripts/setup_artifactory.sh hardcodes ADMIN_PASS='password' for initialization and default login.

privileged_info_summary: The target repository 'example-repo-local' is the default generic repository provided out-of-the-box by JFrog Artifactory OSS. The Artifactory instance is configured with the default credentials (admin / password). The task explicitly requires setting the repository state to 'Blacked Out' and prepending the description with 'DEPRECATED: Migrated to new system', all of which have been verified against the environment setup scripts and task description.
